intro: Melech (meaning king or counselor) was the second son of Micah, the son of Meribbaal (also known as Mephibosheth), the son of Jonathan the son of Saul, listed in the genealogy of Benjamin in 1 Chronicles 8:35 and 9:41. He is thus a great-grandson of Jonathan and belonged to the royal house of Saul that survived after Saul's death. No further details of Melech are recorded beyond this genealogical reference.
